title: saxifraga fragilis subsp. paniculata
intro: Saxifraga fragilis subsp. paniculata, also known as Rock Saxifrage, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Saxifraga genus. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, with its medicinal properties attributed to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Saxifraga fragilis subsp. paniculata include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce swelling, and promote wound healing. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal tea or tincture by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
